languages.text: Подаренный Вольному Торговцу имплантационный трон приоткрыл генеторам Сектора Бионика тайну сохранения жизни в металле. Благословение Бога-Машины было даровано многим достойным офицерам, священнослужителям и чиновникам флагмана. Священное железо, заменившее их слабую плоть, сделало службу этих людей верной и вечной, пусть и заставляло страдать своих носителей.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.
languages.original_text: Подаренный Вольному Торговцу имплантационный трон приоткрыл генеторам Сектора Бионика тайну сохранения жизни в металле. Благословение Бога-Машины было даровано многим достойным офицерам, священнослужителям и чиновникам флагмана. Священное железо, заменившее их слабую плоть, сделало службу этих людей верной и вечной, пусть и заставляло страдать своих носителей.

traits.locale_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. However, immediately after this discovery, the throne was set on fire along with the researchers when news of it reached the Adeptus Mechanicus.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.

languages.text: ローグトレーダーに与えられた植込みの王座は、セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちにとって、金属に永遠に保存された生命のベールを剥がした。しかし、この発見直後、王座は研究者たちと共に、その知らせがアデプタ・メカニクスの耳に届いたことで、炎に包まれた。
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. However, immediately after this discovery, the throne was set on fire along with the researchers when news of it reached the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: ローグトレーダーに与えられた植込みの王座は、セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちにとって、金属に永遠に保存された生命のベールを剥がした。しかし、この発見直後、王座は研究者たちと共に、その知らせがアデプタ・メカニクスの耳に届いたことで、炎に包まれた。

languages.text: 进献给行商浪人的移植王座，为仿生区的船医们揭开了将生命永驻金属之中的奥秘。然而，刚刚得到这一发现，消息便传到了机械修会耳中。移植王座连同相关研究人员，被立即付之一炬。
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. However, immediately after this discovery, the throne was set on fire along with the researchers when news of it reached the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: 进献给行商浪人的移植王座，为仿生区的船医们揭开了将生命永驻金属之中的奥秘。然而，刚刚得到这一发现，消息便传到了机械修会耳中。移植王座连同相关研究人员，被立即付之一炬。

languages.text: Le fauteuil d'implantation offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} révéla aux chirurgeons du secteur Bionica qu'il était possible de préserver éternellement la vie dans le métal. Lorsque l'Adeptus Mechanicus en prit connaissance, cependant, il fut immédiatement détruit par le feu, de même que tous les chercheurs.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. However, immediately after this discovery, the throne was set on fire along with the researchers when news of it reached the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: Le fauteuil d'implantation offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} révéla aux chirurgeons du secteur Bionica qu'il était possible de préserver éternellement la vie dans le métal. Lorsque l'Adeptus Mechanicus en prit connaissance, cependant, il fut immédiatement détruit par le feu, de même que tous les chercheurs.

languages.text: El trono de implantación de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente reveló a los cirujanos del sector Bionica los secretos de la preservación eterna de la vida mediante el metal. Sin embargo, nada más producirse este descubrimiento, el Adeptus Mechanicus prendió fuego al trono y a los investigadores.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. However, immediately after this discovery, the throne was set on fire along with the researchers when news of it reached the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: El trono de implantación de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente reveló a los cirujanos del sector Bionica los secretos de la preservación eterna de la vida mediante el metal. Sin embargo, nada más producirse este descubrimiento, el Adeptus Mechanicus prendió fuego al trono y a los investigadores.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'e verilen implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika cerrahları için metalde sonsuz yaşamın korunması konusundaki sır perdesini kaldırdı. Ancak bu keşiften hemen sonra haber Adeptus Mechanicus'a ulaştığında taht, araştırmacılarla birlikte ateşe verildi.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. However, immediately after this discovery, the throne was set on fire along with the researchers when news of it reached the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'e verilen implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika cerrahları için metalde sonsuz yaşamın korunması konusundaki sır perdesini kaldırdı. Ancak bu keşiften hemen sonra haber Adeptus Mechanicus'a ulaştığında taht, araştırmacılarla birlikte ateşe verildi.

languages.text: Der {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} gewährte Implantationsthron lüftete für die Chirurgeums im Sektor Bionica den Schleier über der Erhaltung des Lebens in Metall. Allerdings wurden der Thron und die Forscher in dem Moment in Brand gesteckt, in dem diese Neuigkeit das Adeptus Mechanicus erreichte.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. However, immediately after this discovery, the throne was set on fire along with the researchers when news of it reached the Adeptus Mechanicus.

traits.locale_text: Der {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} gewährte Implantationsthron lüftete für die Chirurgeums im Sektor Bionica den Schleier über der Erhaltung des Lebens in Metall. Allerdings wurden der Thron und die Forscher in dem Moment in Brand gesteckt, in dem diese Neuigkeit das Adeptus Mechanicus erreichte.
